---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

Load the XLSX file

```{r}
library(readxl)
raw_demog_xls <- read_xlsx(
  "./data/AURecruit.xlsx",
  na = c("", "N/A"),
  sheet = "Demog") 
```

```{r}
demog_xls <- raw_demog_xls |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  # move numeric cols to the front
  select(all_of(c("participant", "age", "height")), everything()) |>
  # convert most cols to factors
  mutate(across(-("participant":"height" | "notes"), as_factor)) |>
  glimpse()
```
